scripts.fw:flash: cd firmware && bash ../../../scripts/pio.sh run && bash ../../../scripts/pio.sh run -t upload
scripts.fw:monitor: cd firmware && bash ../../../scripts/pio.sh device monitor -b 115200 --filter direct
scripts.fw:test: cd firmware && bash ../../../scripts/pio.sh run -t upload && bash ../../../scripts/pio.sh device monitor -b 115200
